title: Genesis Story
definition: The inspirational narrative that serves as the foundation for Project Hieros, explaining its purpose and vision.

difficulty_levels.beginner: The Genesis Story is like a powerful speech that sets out the mission and goal of Project Hieros. It tells us why we need this tool and what it can do for science and humanity.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: The Genesis Story serves as a manifesto for Project Hieros, presenting its core principles and vision in a concise and compelling manner. It's designed to inspire people to join the project and contribute to its growth.
difficulty_levels.expert: The Genesis Story is a foundational text that outlines the purpose, philosophy, and ethos of Project Hieros. It sets the tone for the project's development and provides a unifying narrative that guides its evolution.

extra_fields.insight: The insight in the Genesis Story lies in its ability to inspire and motivate people to join Project Hieros and work towards creating a more connected, collaborative, and innovative scientific community.
